name: Cube Wave
author: Poki
description: Cube Wave is a fun game where you have to dodge the cubes in front of you, while you are collecting gems for extra points. Try to get as far as you can to set a great highscore! How to play: Press spacebar to change direction About the creator: Cube Wave was created by KasSanity. He is also known for his other games on Poki which are Twirl , Spin Escape and Color Crash .
